perPress.label: long-range-datadog-failover-alternatives
perPress.answerPreview: Yes, we considered Paxos first, but Raft's leader-based model fit our failover requirement more cleanly. With lease-based extensions on top, we got the deterministic leader handoff we needed, and we proved the design under partition with chaos tests before shipping.
